entry.title: TestSuite Analytics: Download to excel
entry.content:
Test Suite Analytics - Multiple test plan status report  download to excel loses status icon from excel. This is feature which works in Solution manager 7.2 SP15 (07/2022). Now we have 7.2 SP19 (07/2024). This same fenomen is with several reports, when downloading to excel

  • Multiple Test Plan Status Details:Type, Ready to Test in Sequence ja Overall Status,
    Execution Status  icons is missing
  • Test Plan – Test Packages Analysis: Test Note ja Test result icons is missing
  • Test Plan – Test Cases Analysis: Test Note, Test result ja Overall status icons is missing
  • Test Package - Test Cases Analysis: Test Note, Test result ja Status icons is missing
  • Test Plan - Defects Analysis -raportti: Status icons is missing
  • Test Package - Defects Analysis:Status ja Type icons is missing

I couldn find notes or any hints what is going on. It seems coherent behavior in all reports - icons are not downloaded to file. 

Any ideas?

SAP Solution Manager

entry.title: bachup subaccount
entry.content:
Hello , 

Is there a way to restore a deleted subaccount?

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - Trading Partner Management Execution error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am also facing the same issue. Were you able to solve it? I am trying to test IDoc Sender Communication scenario by sending an Idoc from Postman. However the Partner Determination script and the XSLT doesnt determine partner correctly. It goes to "Unassigned Interchanges" in B2B Monitor

entry.title: Re: How to pate System Genrated password in SAP LOGIN Scr...
entry.content: Copy and paste the password separately, rather than copying and pasting both the user ID and password together. This allows the system to accept passwords longer than 12 characters.

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Canno...
entry.content:
Hi @simon_luser,

Thank you for your response.

Just to confirm, our understanding is correct that the connection utilizes TCP rather than HTTPS protocols? During our additional testing with the Cloud Connector, we observed that all configured HTTP connections work as expected. However, when attempting to use TCP, we consistently encounter the aforementioned error.

Would you happen to know if any additional configuration is required on the Cloud Connector side to support TCP connections?

Looking forward to your insights.

Best regards,
Marco

entry.title: Why still no line items in KSBP even if integrated planning is activated for current FY
entry.content:
Hi all expert, 

I want to know, why there are no line items or any change records for current FY2025 in KSBP? I checked all setting (version and FY) in KP96 and integrated planning is already activated. For all previous FYs shown line items and tracking records in KBSP. And this problem just exists in production system not in devolop/test system. 

I look forward to your help and advices. Thank you very much in advance.

#SAP S4/HANA

BR

Lucky

Please let us know if further queries.

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: WFA - Permission artifacts sync job failing
entry.content:
Hello.

Workforce Analytics permission artifacts sync job is failing, which is preventing us to use some structural dimensions in workforce analytics. Error log is the following:

Full exception:com.successfactors.jobscheduler.ScheduledJobExecutionException: com.successfactors.jobscheduler.ScheduledJobExecutionException: com.successfactors.jobscheduler.ScheduledJobExecutionException: com.successfactors.jobscheduler.ScheduledJobExecutionException: com.successfactors.rbp.app.api.RBPFacadeException: Error update dimension [82].
at com.successfactors.inform.scheduledjob.SyncWfaAndBizxInstanceJob.executeJob(SyncWfaAndBizxInstanceJob.java:149)
at com.successfactors.jobscheduler.jobimpl.SimpleJob.execute(SimpleJob.java:471)
at jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor599.invoke(Unknown Source)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(Unknown Source)
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source)

Can you please help?

@YSE-1 

SAP SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics

entry.title: Re: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts becaus...
entry.content: Yes, indeed as you say: the endusers add them in the Seg Model via attributes and then these contacts are being part of th target group so they get deleted in the next run.

entry.title: BYD Generic Email Text Body does not meet your requrements
entry.content:
Is it possible to change the generic email text body of i.e. a Customer invoice email output?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD Generic Email Text Body does not meet your requre...
entry.content:
When sending a customer invoice via email, you might want to customize the generic email text body to better suit your needs. Here are two options to achieve this:

  1. Edit Output Settings Before Release:

    • Before releasing the document, open the edit output settings.
    • You can change the generic email text body here.
    • Note that this needs to be done for each individual output.

  2. Create an HTML Email Template:

    • You can create an HTML email template for specific form, country, and language variants.
    • For example, create an HTML email template for a Customer Invoice in UK English.
    • In the application and User Management, go to Form Template Maintenance.
    • Select the form variant and click on the action button.
    • Choose the option to create an email template and upload your HTML template.

The advantage of using an HTML email template is that you can design your email creatively to match your preferences.

entry.title: Currency Translation
entry.content: How does the currency conversion functionality in group reporting resolve the issue of generating cash flow statements? Since the balance sheet uses period-end exchange rates for conversion (i.e., cash items are translated at the closing rate), while the opening amount in the cash flow statement equals the previous period"s amount. This results in a discrepancy where the closing value of the cash flow statement does not match the cash item amount on the balance sheet.

entry.title: Re: SAML and 2212795

entry.title: Unable to Access Training Content of Developing SAPUI5 Applications
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I'm encountering an "Error 500 - Internal Server Error" when trying to access a course on SuccessMap Learning (Developing SAPUI5 Applications). This issue is ongoing and is blocking access to important training material.

Could you please look into this issue?

entry.title: Routing C4C Messages to the Correct FSM Company in a Multi-Company Scenario
entry.content:
Dear community members, here is  description of a challenge and a possible solution which I'd like to validate with you. Would you agree with the approach or would you see a better way?

Background:

  

  • We have a single SAP Sales & Service Cloud (C4C) tenant that needs to route service-related messages to several SAP Field Service Management (FSM) clients within a single FSM tenant. 
  • Currently, FSM is structured to support several subsidiaries, where each subsidiary operates as an independent FSM client (company).

     

     

    Challenge: 

    • In the existing integration, C4C is set up with a single communication system that contains a fixed FSM client ID. 

       

      • However, the challenge arises when additional FSM clients (subsidiaries) are introduced. 
        • The system currently lacks a dynamic mechanism to route messages to the correct FSM client based on business logic, such as the customer’s subsidiary, country, or sales organization.

          Key Questions for Solution Design:

           

          1. Message Routing in Integration Flows (CPI vs. SDK vs. Other Options)

           

          • What is the best-practice approach to dynamically determine and assign the correct FSM client ID when sending service tickets, registered products, and other business objects from one C4C tenant to FSM?

           

          • Should the routing logic be implemented in SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI/iFlows), leveraging payload analysis (e.g., based on sales org, country, or business unit)?

           

          • Would it be more efficient to manage this routing directly inside C4C SDK (PDI development) by dynamically modifying the FSM client ID before sending the message?

           

          • Are there any standard FSM APIs or SAP-recommended patterns for handling multi-company routing in an FSM landscape?

           

           

           

          2. Communication System Configuration in C4C

           

          • Since the C4C communication system requires a fixed FSM client ID, is it possible to dynamically change this field during runtime?

           

          • Could creating multiple communication systems or communication arrangements in C4C be a viable workaround, where each FSM client has a dedicated communication system?

           

          • If we use a single communication system, could an intermediary step in CPI modify the client ID before the message reaches FSM?

          3. Handling Return Messages & Bidirectional Sync

           

          • When FSM sends updates back to C4C, how should the system ensure that responses from different FSM clients (companies) are correctly routed to their respective C4C records?

           

          • Would it be necessary to extend C4C objects (e.g., Tickets) to store FSM client metadata for correct routing upon return messages?

          4. Future-Proofing for Additional FSM Clients

           

          • How scalable is the proposed approach if more subsidiaries (FSM clients) need to be added in the future?

           

          • Would the recommended solution work seamlessly in a scenario where FSM continues to expand its multi-client structure?

           

          • Are there any upcoming enhancements in SAP FSM roadmap that could simplify this process in future releases?

          Expected Outcome:

           

           

          • The goal is to identify the most efficient, maintainable, and SAP-compliant approach to dynamically route C4C messages to the correct FSM client. 
          • The solution should be scalable, ensure bidirectional communication, and minimize custom development effort.

             

             

            Am I missing anything or do you feel whether anything is not articulated right?

             

            Your Quick response would be great so I can submit the questions to the experts still today and get you a tentative proposal as early as possible.

            A possible solution

             

            To efficiently route SAP Sales & Service Cloud (C4C) messages to the correct FSM company within a single FSM tenant, while using standard SAP tools (CPI) and avoiding custom development, the recommended approach is: 

             

            1. Use SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) for Dynamic Routing 

             

            • Single outbound integration from C4C to one CPI iFlow (no need for multiple communication arrangements). 
              • CPI determines the correct FSM company based on business rules (e.g., sales org, country). 
                • Routing options in CPI: 
                • Add FSM company identifier (X-Company-ID) dynamically in the API request headers. 
                • Use a value mapping table in CPI to link C4C attributes (e.g., country) to FSM company IDs. 
                • Optionally, configure multiple receiver endpoints in CPI, one per FSM company.  
                  • 2. C4C Configuration – Single Communication System with Multiple System Instances
                  • Define one Communication System for FSM with multiple System Instances, one for each FSM company.
                    • Each instance represents a logical FSM company, keeping ID mapping clear in C4C. 
                    •  This approach is fully supported by SAP and aligns with best practices for multi-client integration. 

                       

                      3. Handling Return Messages (FSM to C4C) 

                      • Standard FSM APIs return updates with the FSM Service Call ID and Company ID in headers. 

                      •  C4C’s Document Flow stores the FSM Service Call ID, ensuring updates match the correct ticket. 

                      • CPI simply forwards FSM updates to C4C—no additional custom logic needed in most cases. 

                         

                        4. SAP Best Practices & Future-Proofing 

                      •  SAP’s prepackaged C4C-FSM integration assumes a single FSM company, so CPI must handle multi-company routing. 

                      • SAP FSM APIs support multi-company integration using headers—this should be an SAP-compliant method. 
                      • SAP’s roadmap (2025-2026) is improving multi-company integration, meaning future updates may simplify this further. 

                        Key Benefits of This Approach: 

                         No custom development in C4C (standard communication setup). 
                         Minimal CPI adjustments (only routing logic needed). 
                         SAP-supported, upgrade-friendly approach. 
                         Easier to maintain than multiple communication arrangements or iFlows. 

                        p.s. Apologies a slight mess with the HTML formatting

                      •  

                      •  

                      •

entry.title: Excited to be part of this Group!
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am Arun Ponnuraj with around 16+ years of experience around Master Data Governance, Management and Orchestration in SAP. Excited to join this group and looking forward to contribute to this group as much as I can!

Regards,
Arun

entry.title: Re: Update S-user's E-mail Addresses.
entry.content:
We are seeing a forced connection to Universal ID when changing a domain for a user. A supplier company is working to change their domain.

We were in a session with SAP about "Identity" and "S user" that also seemed to indicate Universal ID is planned to go away.


Do you have any thoughts or guidance on this?  The whole Universal ID requirement as part of the email change?

Best Regards, Wallace

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Drop shipment and returns scenario for Trans...
entry.content:
Hi @KB786 ,

I would suggest you to create FOs both the cases with different freight Order Types...Assume

1. FO with Transportation from Customer to WH

2. FO without Transportation...example like self Delivery/customer pick up only for documentation purpose ...Please explore on this

Benefit: you can track all returns with the above...

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Unit price with GST and remove GST from that price SA...
entry.content:
Dear @nikunjmehta2290 ,

This can be enabled via sap support's help. But it is applied across the database and cannot be made only with specific item group.

Alternatively, you may apply this logic using FMS is the row total against the specific item group.

Thanks.

- The Split valuation activation has no transport option, do I have to activate in each environment?(DEV/QAS/PRD)

Best Regards,
Mauricio Predolim

entry.title: Selection of the Exchange Rate in a standard variable
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a standard variable that takes a variable filled by a dynamic default within a lookup entity to the Exchange Rate table, specifically a currency exchange column called Exchange Rate type.

However, when I view the preview of the Analytical Model (AM), it does not allow me to navigate within the column to select the desired value, as it does for other filters like Company Currency.

Is it possible to solve this issue without adding the Exchange Rate table to the AM, so using the Standard Variable?

Thenks

entry.title: Re: Purchase requisition (ME5F)
entry.content:
Hello @jebari 

That depends on the selection criteria of ME5F. Purchase requisitions are released with release codes. You have an authorization to release with specific release codes. Thus you should enter the code when you run ME5F. It's at the top of the selection screen.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: If Statement
entry.content: =If(Year([Order Date]) = 2020; [Order Date]; [Ship Date])

entry.title: Re: Extending Server-Side Caching not working
entry.content:
Yes, you are right. The instructions in the documentation are not working. When I followed the instructions on my local, it did not broke OOTB caches but custom cache was not working. I managed to make it work by applying the following steps:

1. Create ehcache configuration file ehcache.xml under folder <extensionname>/resources/occ/v2/<extensionname>/cache.

<ehcache xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" 
         xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="../config/ehcache.xsd" updateCheck="false" monitoring="autodetect" 
         dynamicConfig="true"> 
 
   <!-- 
   see ehcache-core-*.jar/ehcache-failsafe.xml for description of elements 
    --> 
 
   <diskStore path="java.io.tmpdir/xyzocc_cache"/> 
   <defaultCache 
         maxElementsInMemory="100000" 
         eternal="false" 
         timeToIdleSeconds="360" 
         timeToLiveSeconds="360" 
         overflowToDisk="true" 
         diskPersistent="false" 
            maxElementsOnDisk="10" 
         diskExpiryThreadIntervalSeconds="360" 
         memoryStoreEvictionPolicy="FIFO" 
         /> 
 
   <!-- sample cache configuration --> 
   <cache name="sampleCache" 
          maxElementsInMemory="1000" 
          eternal="false" 
          overflowToDisk="true" 
          timeToLiveSeconds="150" 
          diskPersistent="false" 
           maxElementsOnDisk="2000" 
          memoryStoreEvictionPolicy="LRU"/> 
 
</ehcache>

2. Create cache-config-spring.xml file under folder <extensionname>/resources/occ/v2/<extensionname>/config

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<!-- 
 Copyright (c) 2020 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company. All rights reserved. 
--> 
<beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" 
xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" 
       xmlns:cache="http://www.springframework.org/schema/cache" 

xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" 
       xmlns:utils="http://www.springframework.org/schema/util" 

xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans 
	http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd 
	http://www.springframework.org/schema/cache 
	http://www.springframework.org/schema/cache/spring-cache.xsd 
	http://www.springframework.org/schema/util 
	http://www.springframework.org/schema/util/spring-util.xsd"> 
 
   <alias name="defaultXyzoccCacheManager" alias="xyzoccCacheManager"/> 
   <bean id="defaultXyzoccCacheManager" class="org.springframework.cache.ehcache.EhCacheCacheManager"> 
      <property name="cacheManager" ref="xyzoccEhcache"/> 
   </bean> 
 
   <alias name="defaultXyzoccEhcache" alias="xyzoccEhcache"/> 
   <bean id="defaultXyzoccEhcache" class="de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.cache.TenantAwareEhCacheManagerFactoryBean"> 
      <property name="cacheNamePrefix" value="xyzoccCache_"/> 
      <property name="configLocation" value="/occ/v2/xyzocc/cache/ehcache.xml"/> 
   </bean> 
</beans>

 

3. Import the bean definition into <extensionname>-spring.xml

 

<import resource="occ/v2/xyzocc/config/cache-config-spring.xml" />

 

4. Add the following bean definition into <extensionname>/resources/occ/v2/<extensionname>/web/spring/<extensionname>-web-spring.xml

 

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
	<property name="targetObject" ref="compositeWsCacheManager" />
	<property name="targetMethod" value="setCacheManagers" />
	<property name="arguments">
		<list>
			<ref bean="xyzoccCacheManager"/>
		</list>
	</property>
</bean>

 

Hope this helps,

entry.title: Cap application stops listen Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have a CAP App with multi tenancy arch. And I am using Event Mesh with these configuration but while in application use somewhere in application is stopping listening the queue. When I restart the app, app is woking fine again.

Why this stituaion might happen, any idea?

"messaging": {
        "kind": "enterprise-messaging-shared",
        "subscribePrefix": "$namespace/",
        "queue": {
          "name": "$namespace/etransport-queue",
          "accessType": "NON_EXCLUSIVE"
        }
      }

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Old database problem

entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content:
Hi @Bhavik2 
I am not sure how you arrived at the learning journey, can you please let me know where you find the link? 
The Utilizing SAP Build for Low-Code/No-Code Applications and Automations for Citizen Developers (LSC00001) was tired
Successors:
Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Learning
Developing Apps with SAP Build Apps using Drag-and-Drop Simplicity | SAP Learning
Extending SAP S/4HANA with SAP Build Apps and Key User Extensibility | SAP Learning
Implementing and Administering SAP Build Work Zone | SAP Learning

Kind regards
Margit

#CPQ #identity #federation

entry.title: Re: Shared Memory-enabled Classes and Create Data – Area Handle
entry.content:
👉 Think to create the method IF_SHM_BUILD_INSTANCE~BUILD 

Otherwise dump occurs :  Runtime Errors DYN_CALL_METH_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
Except. CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_METHOD

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP ASE Version and Patch Support Roadmap
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

 

We are currently running SAP ASE 16.0 SP03 PL09 and would like to understand SAP’s available plan for ASE versions and patches in the coming years, as well as the support options available for them.

 

Specifically, we would like to clarify the following:

SAP ASE Version and Patch Availability

  1. What is SAP’s roadmap for future ASE releases and patches?
  2. How long will SAP continue to provide major patches for security and bug fixes for ASE 16.0 and ASE 16.1?
  3. Clarify what "Mainstream Maintenance" includes?
  4. What kind of support and service options will be available to us after the Mainstream Maintenance period?

 

For reference, based on the Product Availability Matrix, we have gathered the following details:

 

SAP ASE 16.0

 

  •  
  • Release to Customer (RTC): 14.03.DIGITS
  •  
  • General Availability: 14.03.DIGITS
  •  
  • End of Mainstream Maintenance: 31.12.DIGITS

 

SAP ASE 16.1

 

  •  
  • Release to Customer (RTC): Estimated for Q1/DIGITS
  •  
  • General Availability: Estimated for Q1/DIGITS
  •  
  • End of Mainstream Maintenance: 31.12.DIGITS

 

We appreciate your guidance on these topics so we can plan our ASE upgrade and maintenance strategy accordingly.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Message No. FML_CUST079
entry.content: Hi. Try SE37 with function module GET_BWKEY_CURRENCY_INFO in debugging mode and see, what's written in lx_cust, if call of method get_cvtyp_info_list fails. Hope that helps!

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on SAP ASE Version and Patch Support Roadmap
entry.content:
Dear customer,

regarding to your questions:

  1. What is SAP’s roadmap for future ASE releases and patches?

SAP ASE provides a KBA about it. Check it here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sybase/3362697344.html

Basically, the last version of ASE will be 16.1 which was released on 28/02/2025, and we will not have newer versions in the future. 

   2. How long will SAP continue to provide major patches for security and bug fixes for ASE 16.0 and ASE 16.1? 

Following this document: https://me.sap.com/notes/3504083

SAP will provide Support and bug fixes until 31 December 2027 for 16.0 and 31 December 2030 for 16.1.

   3 .Clarify what "Mainstream Maintenance" includes?

Mainstream maintenance is offered for all SAP software releases. Mainstream maintenance begins with the release-to-customer date and continues throughout the unrestricted shipment phase. In the Mainstream Maintenance phase, SAP will provide support and bug fixes for ASE.

   4. What kind of support and service options will be available to us after the Mainstream Maintenance period?

The future level of support available depends on your contract's specific agreements. Here is a link that explain more about the SAP Maintenance Phases: SAP Maintenance Phases

Some of this information or date can be modified in the future.

entry.title: Re: (Bill of Exchange) Incoming payments Error in the Bra...
entry.content:
Hello,

Check if all the directories are valid in System Initialization -> General Settings, "Path" folder (especially "Boleto Folder"). Also check if the dll of the bank is in this folder.

Also, check if you have any attachment in "Attachments" folder of the payment.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Canno...
entry.content: The following tutorial (step 5) may also be of some help. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-clients-cf.html

entry.title: Re: Enqueue Read Validation
entry.content:
Strange, as SAP also does its check in the main form beleg_sichern, something seems wrong in your current user-exits there, some forms intended for check are used for update, you should correct this first, use forms like USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD or PREPARE instead of CHECK.

Only lock the credit record in USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE, last statements suggested, if already locked, stop saving with gf_exit_save_document_prepare = 'X' and a message 'sorry locked, please try again', if not locked and not enough credit, unlock, send a message 'no more credit' and stop saving in the same way. Otherwise, register the credit limit update in any FM update task. The commit will release the record.

In USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT it's too late, you can only abort the transaction in case of failure, so user input is lost.

SAP also provides such a credit limit in the standard, was not accepted?

entry.title: Re: Transport Management from quality to production system
entry.content:
Hi, keep an eye on this roadmap item https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800001492&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=000D3AAADBCE1EEBB1AB4BFC73441C37 and in the upcoming releases, as transport mechanisms are planned. In parallel, you can always raise a Customer Influence enhancement request at https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3537

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Key Enhancements to the SAP Fieldglass Road map
entry.content:
In an ever-evolving world, we must constantly improve ourselves. SAP Activate embraces this concept at its core and provides new content through an iterative model. This time, we are transforming the SAP Fieldglass road map to make it even more useful and up-to-date for our customers. Over the past few weeks, we have added and updated more than 35 accelerators and improved the content in over 50 tasks.

We are providing customers with new documentation that can be used throughout the implementation journey, empowering both them and their partners to better understand the system and take ownership of the implementation. The key highlights are related to Fit-to-Standard information, where more than 12 accelerators have been added across five different tasks to enhance knowledge on the topic and improve the quality of the workshops.

The updates made to the tasks' Procedures are divided across the six phases and primarily cover project enablement and preparation; Fit-to-Standard assessments and requirement gathering; data management, testing, and quality assurance; project execution and sprint management; integration and configuration; and go-live support.

Check out the changes in the SAP Fieldglass Content Updates file, the road map viewer within SAP for Me, or in Cloud ALM!

entry.title: Re: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content: Can you confirm what is the value of ASE configuration "net password encryption reqd" set to ?

entry.title: Re: FMS Correction into SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

It seems to me that this is Formmated Search syntax, so you can get all the information directly from the matrix, like this:

SELECT $[$38.U_PriceAfter.0] - $[$38.82.0] FROM DUMMY

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content: Also, please confirm if $LD_LIBRARY_PATH includes directories which have libsapcrypto.so

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content: That's right. This is not customizable by default, but you can use or write an add-on

entry.title: Re: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content: Also we need to confirm you are not using old libsapcrypto.so (underneath CCL libraries) libraries which are old/incompatible

entry.title: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content:
after app is build and in test flight mode, I have seen that the name of the app is incorrect on iOS when it is downloaded to my iphone. it shows 'SAPBuildsApps'. it is the same when I download the app on MacOS with M1 (can use the iphone app).

I checked the build settings and the app name is shown correctly (and different from SAPBuildApps).

Please check, thank you

Chantal CHI

entry.title: CU62 - No authorization to delete change documents
entry.content:
Hi,

in CU62, variant configuration, we want to delete a table, but thereforce authorization check is requiring:

S_SCD0 and S_SCD_OBJ with ACTVT 06 (delete)

As I know change douments never should be deleted in any application, right?
I doubt it is correct to grant this authorization for deleting...

Does anybody know why this seems required when trying to delete table in CU62?
For example if user are getting deleted (SU01), change documents will be still existing.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: F-44 found down payment to be cleared not unique Mess...
entry.content:
Problem Statement: Asset XX01 24000005-0: down payment not cleared to be unique Message no. AAPO219

Answer: The above message was received when we executed F-44. In order to rectify the same, first we executed F-54 and applied the Invoice number (FI Document number), Line item (blank) and executed to process open items. The down payment open items appeared that we transferred or applied with same amounts.

Second Step: Execution of F-44 again and now the clearing was done and document was saved.

Amit Chetan Sood

entry.title: Seamless Integration with SAP CI: Mastering Pagination for Coupa Adapter
entry.content:
Continuing my SAP CI Pagination blog series, this time with the Coupa Adapter! 

When integrating with Coupa, handling large datasets efficiently requires a proper pagination strategy. Unlike Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics CRM, which rely on next page links, Coupa uses an offset-based pagination approach. Here, data is fetched in chunks based on the offset and limit values set in the adapter.

In this blog, I’ll cover:
✅How pagination works in the Coupa adapter using offset & limit
✅Best practices for optimizing API calls and handling large datasets
✅A step-by-step implementation to ensure seamless data retrieval

If you missed the last blogs in this series on Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamic CRM adapters, below are the links:

Seamless Integration with SAP CI: Mastering Pagination for Salesforce Adapter

Seamless Integration with SAP CI: Mastering Pagination for Microsoft Dynamics CRM Adapter 

Coupa Adapter - Handling Large Data Sets with Pagination

In this use case, we focus on retrieving records from the invoices resource in Coupa, which contains 50+ records. To achieve this, we use Query Resource operation to retrieve data. While the adapter provides an Auto Pagination feature that retrieves all pages in a single call, this approach can lead to significant performance issues when dealing with large datasets.

Fetching data page by page, processing each batch, and then moving to the next page is the best approach for handling large datasets. In this blog, I will explain the end-to-end batching process, ensuring seamless data synchronization while optimizing API performance.

Design Approach: 

The scenario involves sending invoices resource from Coupa to a target system that has a batch limit of 10 records per request. To accommodate this constraint, we implement a custom pagination approach using Coupa receiver adapter call.

The call fetches the page of records within a looping process to retrieve the pages one after the other. Each fetched page is passed through message mapping, ensuring seamless transformation before being delivered to the target system. This cycle continues—fetching a page, processing it, and sending it to the target—until all records are transferred, ensuring an efficient full end to end Batching processing and controlled data flow from Coupa to the target system.

Design components elaboration:

Timer : This is a timer based flow which be a scheduled as per the user's input

Content Modifier : "set properties" - This step is used to declare propeties such as CoupaResource, fieldnames, Coupa_limit, Coupa_offset, StartDate.

Property NameUse
CoupaResourceName of the resource that has to be queried
fieldnamesfieldnames of the resource that has to be queried
Coupa_limitNumber of records per page
Coupa_offsetoffset value, is set as "0" as we intend to fetch all the pages without missing a single record
StartDateDate from which the records to be queried, refers to updated-at in Coupa resource

Understanding Offset and Limit in Coupa Pagination

In this design, the two key parameters to control data retrieval are Offset and Limit. Unlike cursor-based pagination (as seen in Salesforce and MS Dynamics), Coupa follows an offset-based pagination approach, where:

Limit – Defines the number of records per page (e.g., if set to 10, each API call fetches 10 records).
Offset – Determines the starting point for the next batch of records. In our design after each request, the offset is incremented by the limit value (10) to fetch the next set of data.

  • The initial request starts with Offset = 0 and Limit = 10.
  • The next request will have Offset = 10, Limit = 10, fetching records from 11 to 20.
  • This process continues in a loop until the last page is reached.

Looping Process Call : "Initiate Coupa Call"

This Looping Process Call continuously runs until the  field is absent from the response payload. The condition for looping is: ${property.RecordsPresent} = 'true'

I have used a Groovy script to help us determine when to stop fetching records.

🔹After each Coupa API call, the response is checked for the following error:

<errors>
   <error>No results match your search criteria.</error>
</errors>

🔹If this error is found, it means there are no more pages left, and the script sets:
 RecordsPresent = false (End of pagination)

🔹Otherwise, if valid records are present, the script sets:
RecordsPresent = true (Continue fetching the next page)

The Looping Process Call continues until RecordsPresent = 'false', ensuring controlled pagination.

Coupa receiver adapter:

Theadapter is placed inside the Looping Process Call to fetch records page by page.

Processing Tab

-- Operation : Query Resource

-- Resource : Resource dynamically passed from ${property.CoupaResource}

-- Return Object Fields : Fields dynamically passed from ${property.fieldnames}

-- Limit : Defines the number of records per page (e.g., 10 records per page). This value cannot be passed dynamically and only accepts numeric values. To control it, we declare "Coupa.limit" as a property.

-- Offset : Determines the starting point for data retrieval in pagination. It must always start at 0 and cannot be passed dynamically, as it only accepts numeric values. To handle this limitation, we declare "Coupa.offset" as a property and increment its value after every API call to fetch the next set of records.

TheAdapter supports setting this via the properties "Coupa.limit"and "Coupa.offset" allowing better control over pagination.

We are not digging into the connection tab in this blog, this blog focuses only on pagination concept.

Groovy Script : Set Coupa Offset Parameter

Below script control the offset incrementation as well as last page identification

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

def processData(Message message) {
    // Get the property value from the message and cast it to an integer
    def propertyValueString = message.getProperty("Coupa_offset")
    def propertyValue = propertyValueString ? propertyValueString.toInteger() : 0 // Convert to integer, default to 0 if null or empty
    def Coupa_limit = message.getProperty("Coupa_limit") as Integer
    
    // Add 50 to the Coupa_offset
    propertyValue += Coupa_limit

    // Set the modified offset value back to the message
    message.setProperty("Coupa_offset", propertyValue.toString()) // Convert back to string for setting property

    // Parse the body of the message
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String)
    def slurper = new groovy.util.XmlSlurper().parseText(body)

    // Check if the specific error message is present in the body
    def errorPresent = slurper.depthFirst().find { it.name() == 'error' && it.text() == 'No results match your search criteria.' } != null

    // Set the CountObjects property based on the presence of the error message
    message.setProperty("RecordsPresent", !errorPresent)

    return message
}

 

Router : "Data?" -

A router is used to determine whether the fetched page contains any records. If records are present, the integration flow proceeds to process to next steps. However, if the page is empty, the flow terminates immediately, preventing unnecessary processing.

This check ensures optimized execution by stopping the pagination loop when there are no more records to fetch, improving efficiency and reducing unnecessary API calls.

Process Call : "Message Mapping" - 

After fetching each page, the data is passed to Message Mapping, where it is processed before being sent to the target system. This step is target-specific and is not covered in this blog.

For demonstration purposes, I have included this step to mimic the "send to target" operation after message mapping. The key focus of this blog remains on pagination handling in the Coupa adapter.

Output  / offset and limit explaintion:

For a total of 54 records, the pagination process spans 6 pages:

  • First 5 pages contain 10 records each.
  • Page 6 contains the remaining 4 records.

When the 7th page is fetched, the response contains as below, which means end of records/pages.

<errors> <error>No results match your search criteria.</error> </errors>

Page 1 : Response from the Coupa system contains 10 records as per the set limit and with offset = 0 

Page 2 : Offset = Offset (10)+ limit(10) = 20, the adapter skips the first 10 records and responds with next 10 records in this call.

Page 3 : Offset = Offset (20)+ limit(10) = 30, the adapter skips the first 20 records and responds with next 10 records in this call.

Page 4 : Offset = Offset (30)+ limit(10) = 40, the adapter skips the first 30 records and responds with next 10 records in this call.

Page 5 : Offset = Offset (40)+ limit(10) = 50, the adapter skips the first 40 records and responds with next 10 records in this call.

Page 6 : Offset = Offset (50)+ limit(10) = 60, the adapter skips the first 50 records and responds with next 10 records in this call. This is the last page containing 4 records.

Page 7 : Offset = Offset (60)+ limit(10) = 70, the adapter skips the first 50 records and responds with next 10 records in this call. <error> tag in the response which means end of records/pages

Full run in TRACE

Wrapping Up

With limit and offset handling in place, we achieve a structured and efficient pagination mechanism in Coupa Adapter. By leveraging properties like Coupa.limit and Coupa.offset, along with a controlled looping process, we ensure seamless data retrieval without unnecessary API calls.

This approach not only optimizes performance but also ensures that large datasets are processed efficiently and accurately. Stay tuned for the next blog in this series, where we continue exploring pagination strategies across different adapters! 

I hope this helps!

Cheers,

Punith

entry.title: Re: When testing PunchOut Catalogue, items are not being Added to Cart?

Hi,

"The cart page" you refer to is in your shop site or the customer ERP?

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: 1st BADI for Inbound and last BADI for Outbound IDOC, in general?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

ECC_SENDER_SYS is sending out the Reservation (RKPF and RESB, tx. MB21) IDOC to another ECC_RECEIVER_SYS, but data is getting modified! Say for example the Sender sys put the material number as MATNR_1 on its OB IDOC, well, then we placed external break-points in FMs of IDOC_START_INBOUND, IDOC_INPUT; BADI IDOC_DATA_WRAPPER implementation class and saw that the material # as MATNR_2 in Inbound IDOC in receiver sys, some where its over writing MATNR data, but don't know where its getting over writing, we want to know the location / piece of code

Pls. let us know the BADI / ENH / User-Exit that comes first when the Inbound IDOC comes into Receiver sys. From Call Stack we saw above FMs and BADI

Same way, pls. let us know the very last BADI / ENH / User-Exit that hits before the outbound IDOC sent out by sender sys?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Canno...
entry.content: I don't know if this lib uses TCP, I assume yes, for Cloud Connector there is no further configuration necessary besides the backend mapping.

entry.title: Re: Configure your own IDP - SSO in SAP CPQ
entry.content:
@VrushabhFasge 
Yes you can upload the metadata file which will auto update all the revelant details into needed fields in CPQ. Its self service enabling in SAP CPQ and no need of Support colleagues interaction or tickets to enable SSO.

entry.title: Not able to change Profit center with a If condition is Badi Implementation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to change the profit center in Create supplier invoice application from 5050 to 1000. We have implemented a Badi 'FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION' where we wrote a if condition for this requirement.  When we try to check after filling all the required data in 'create supplier invoice' app and click on 'CHECK' system changes profit center from 5050 to 1000 as per the requirement, But when we apply IF condition to the assignment in the badi , after 'simulating' the supplier invoice after 'check' is done, system revert from 5050 to 1000 and our requirement fails.

Please suggest us a solution on how to resolve this issue, I have attached a screenshot for the reference.

as you can see, after 'check' profit center is changed to 1000 as intended.

as you can see , after simulating profit center is not changing if we apply if condition as mentioned above.

as mentioned above in image, this is a required result what we required.

folks, please help us resolve the issue.

Thanks,

Rajvardhan Patil.

entry.title: FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the Layout field column (Transaction)
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the column Of Transactions Key,  

Could you please guide us on how to retrieve the details from that specific field.

entry.title: Re: LMS Time zone issue in classes
entry.content:
Hi @yadlapallisya 

Where exactly is the admin seeing the classes in UTC? Is it within Learning Admin (Learning Activities > Classes) or when the admin makes a library search, at the LMS user side?

entry.title: Re: Print PDF from SAP with Mac OS X
entry.content: link does not work anymore, any update on this?

entry.title: Re: Simulation Feature for Business Rules?
entry.content:
Hi @rezasaputro, this is Sylvia, PM for Business Rules Framework at SuccessFactors. 

Thx for sharing this linkedIn post. I can assure you, that the feature described doesn't exist. As @Iulia_Bobaru  mentioned, there are different validations available in the business rules engine itself, but also in the Checktool and in some applications. However, a tool to simulate if a rule is doing what the user thinks it is designed for, the option to "Input test values for the fields or data points involved in the rule (e.g., employee details, job changes, leave dates)." and simulate the rule execution result based on these test values is NOT an available feature!

I know the requirement to have such a functionality from our customer influence tool (https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/46640), however, currently this topic is not on our roadmap.

I added a comment in LinkedIn and ask the author to give more insight in what he described, but didn't get an answer yet.

Hope this helps...

BR, Sylvia

entry.title: I look forward to having a customer who uses onboarding 2.0 without EC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking forward to having a customer who uses onboarding 2.0 without EC. Could you please approach me to share our experiences?

regards, Orkun Turkmen

entry.title: Re: Exporting workspaces in Enable Now cloud
entry.content: Thanks Shane. These will all be brand new WS, so there won't be any issues with conflicting resources. I guess Export/Import it is 😊.

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content:
@MVEL  we have had the same question on our team. Our internal partner explained that this should be related to an update from the previous year in which the UI for configuring roles and permissions was updated (more of an aesthetic change) and introduced as an optional view. It still has the option to switch to the old view but that is expected to be removed with this coming update: 

Therefore no functional and/or operational impact is expected for us, as the team had already been using the new UI for a while. SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting 

It would be great if we could get a quick confirmation if that interpretation is accurate, @nageshpolu 
Thank you in advance!
Levin

entry.title: Re: Datasphere tenant not reachable
entry.content:
https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/cloud-service-status.html?overlayDataCenterId=XAS&overlaySolutionId=NZA752&productName=SAP%20Datasphere

I use this and you can see each data centre (center!)

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/cloud-service-status.html

entry.title: Re: REST Receiver Adapter (sync) binary response. How to...
entry.content:
I add a piece to the puzzle:

The error in pimon

Transmitting the message using connection SOAP_http://sap.com/xi/XI/System failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: Logging message failed, due to Failed to log msg 3def9130-fb50-11ef-8709-00000dadf36a(OUTBOUND). Reason: java.lang.NullPointerException

It says exactly what it says, the PO logger failed to log because the payload it is attempting to log is empty.
This prevent further processing. You would not even reach the response mapping.
This depends on logging parameters of your system / ICO.

The quick fix would be to turn off logging at an ICO level.
The right fix is to set the ICO logging at BI
reference: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/7a/c83c3c90b74c1f9a00d761496e28ea/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Re: Bapi needed fro transaction VF26
entry.content:
Hi, This bapi :BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CANCEL1 is not suitable to cancel invoice list, it only can cancel billing document(invoice), not invoice list. 🤔

Thanks and best regards,

Bella

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Video data story are not available on the analytics mobile application. When will they be available ?

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: Payment terms in installments
entry.content: Take a look at note 530892 (NOT for implementation), this note explains "A split according to the percentages of the installment payment conditions is consequently not possible, however, at least the complete amount can be updated according to the terms of payment of the first installment.". Same logic applies for MM as well.

entry.title: Re: I look forward to having a customer who uses onboardi...
entry.content:
Orkan,

Onboarding 2.0 requires at a minimum an EC Lite or Mini-Master to be implemented.  Today, EC Lite/Mini-Master does not require subscription licenses because you are not implemented many of the features and functionalities of the solution, nor is there any ESS or MSS enable, it simply has to be enabled to support the data structure and data required to adequately support ONB 2.0 data and process requirements: Organization Data (i.e., Company, Division, Location, Job Classification), Employment Information (i.e., PersonlInfo, PersonalInfo, Employment Info, JobInfo and Email Info) and EC Permitted Entities (i.e., Emergency contact info, Global Info, Home Address, imInfo, JobInfo, NationalIDCard, PersonRelationship Info, WorkPermitInfo, CompensationInfo, payCompNonRecurring, pay,CompRecurring)

It should be noted that Crossboarding requires Employee Central to be fully deployed.

You can find more information by searching on "Implementing Onboarding 2.0 with External HRIS System".

entry.title: Re: Help scroll view position app WEB
entry.content: Please help

entry.title: Re: Datasphere tenant not reachable
entry.content: Hello, thanks for the information, it solve the Question, actually we solved with a full deletion of browser cookies and site specific settings (probably the change in datasphere theme that was done yesterday). I remember that this thing happens occasionally, once a year

entry.title: Consume Odata V2 ord V4 in custom App Fiori deployed on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Good morning,


I am writing this post to try to have some information about the subject of the topic. In particular, I have developed a Custom Fiori application and I wanted to deploy and publish it on the Public Cloud. At the same time, I have activated on the same Public Cloud system an odata of the Business Application Hub via Communication System and Communication Arrangment. When I try to deploy the app with the odata exposed on the system(with the endpoit that i obteined during the configuration), I get an error related to the odata. Is there something I am missing?

The errors that are returned to me are:

The use of Gateway OData V2 Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 0001 is not permitted.

The app uses not permitted services for ABAP for Key Users

Solutions or suggestions?


Giuseppe.

entry.title: Re: DMEEX Hierarchy Synchronization
entry.content:
Hi Gary,
When by the "I copy the standard to a Z version" you mean that you create your Z tree as a subtree of an SAP tree, you will have the possibility to synchronize future modifications of the SAP standard tree to your Z tree. But when you do the copy on the same level (without inheritance), the synchronization will not work for you. The main reason for the hierarchy is to allow to profit from the synchronization. And it is valid also for your country templates. Synchronization works as a waterflow from parent tree to its direct child trees.
If you wanted to know something else, please, rephrase your question.
Regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Re: Performance Boost and Caching Strategy for Faster Data Access using "cds-caching" in S
entry.content:
Hey Naveen,

You are missing one of the best features of this plugin, the "Annotations for Entity and Function caching", you can solve your issue in the following way:

using { MasterData.Pincode } from '../db/MasterDataSchema';

service MasterDataService {
@cache: { service : 'caching', ttl : '36000' }
entity Pincodes as projection on Pincode;
}

And if you are not sure if cache is used or not, just use the "Cache Events":

 

 

const cds = require("@sap/cds");

module.exports = async (srv) => {
  const cache = await cds.connect.to("caching");
  // Log after retrieving data
  cache.after("GET", (event) => {
    console.log(`Retrieved key: ${event.data.key} with value: ${event.data.value}`)
  })
};

entry.title: Re: atom Mapping in DMEEX doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi Lan,
it is not 100% clear from the description, but my first guess is, that the value is replaced by another value from some other from the three next atoms. The best option how to be sure is to set trace points also for the next three atoms.
Best regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Re: DMEE_CTX_Pmtinf.....Cd_CTX not displayed in file
entry.content:
Hi,
the best procedure in such cases is to use the trace tool. Set a trace point on the problematic node in DMEEX (and also on its atoms), run the scenario and analyze it. You should see if the value was read from the database and how it was eventually converted and how the resulting value was eventually created from atom values.
Best regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content:
How long is my certification valid?

Because SAP products evolve rapidly, as of April 2024, everyone with an SAP Certification needs to keep their skills and certification valid by completing mandatory yearly assessments.

You need an active SAP Learning Hub subscription to take the short assessment to stay certified. You can access preparation material and take the assessment at any time.

SAP Certifications are valid for one year. If your certification was issued before April 2024, it will expire on March 31, 2025.

Follow these steps to stay certified

  1. Get an SAP Universal ID - Make sure you have a valid SAP Universal ID with at least two email accounts assigned to it.
  2. SAP Learning Hub subscription - Ensure you have an SAP Learning Hub subscription to access the assessment to stay certified. If you have no subscription, you’ll need to book and retake the full 2-3 hour SAP Certification exam every year.
  3. Check your certification status - Log in to My Learning to see your certifications and their expiration dates. Make sure you complete the short annual assessment as soon as possible to extend the validity of your certification by 12 months. If the certification has been retired and you want to retain your certified status, you need to re-certify in an alternative certification. Find recommended alternatives using the SAP Certification finder.
  4. Prepare for the assessment - Find preparation courses or live sessions linked under your certification.
  5. Take the assessment - The assessment is a short, non-proctored quiz with unlimited attempts. Once you’ve completed it successfully, the validity of your certification will be extended by 12 months.
  6. Congratulations - After completing the assessment with the status of approved, click on “Verify course completion”, then it will be confirmed that you have completed the process to remain certified. In my case, 1 day after completing the assessment, the certification renewal date was updated for another 12 months in SAP Learning and Credly.

I hope this blog has helped you renew your SAP certification.

If you found this blog useful, please like, follow and share your knowledge.

Feel free to leave your comment or ask any questions related to the topic.

Clóvis Müller

entry.title: How to change destination Bin or HU in RF Screen?
entry.content:
I wanted to change the Destination HU and destination Putaway Bin during RF Putaway.

Is it possible to change the source bin during picking for the Outbound Delivery in RF, as system assigns the source bin in RF and we can only scan.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change destination Bin or HU in RF Screen?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

When performing warehouse tasks, it is possible to change the destination bin and HU during the putaway process by using an exception code. If you cannot access the proposed destination bin for exemple, you can select an option to change the destination bin and then enter the new destination.

However, for the picking process of an outbound delivery, the source bin is not typically changed during RF transactions because the system determines the source bin based on predefined settings and assignments. In such scenarios, you can only confirm the pick from the assigned source bin or use exception handling if there are issues with the source bin.

For both processes, exceptions can be handled by choosing options like ‘Except’ for changing the destination or reporting issues during picking if the required bin isn’t accessible. You can refer to specific configurations and exceptions set up in your RF transaction settings to handle such cases.

Please check further information about the Exceptions below:

Exceptions

Note that if you're using a radio frequency (RF) device, you can enter LIST to get a list of all valid exceptions in RF transactions (see Working with Mobile RF Devices).

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.12.212
entry.content:
I'm trying to build an app. Web build.
It's an old app imported from Appgyver. I did some builds a year ago. Everything worked. But now i need some updates and i can't build. I need help! Thankyou!

Getting the error below at 92%.

AB version: 3.15.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Sphere to SAP HANA Cloud Certificate Validat...
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to use Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
Hello Peter,

in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation notifications will be sent to the person 'Responsible' for the task (Defect / Requirement etc. belonging to task type).

If the person would like to get e-mail notifications, it has to be activated via 'Settings' for the particular object:

I hope it helps.

I'll proceed with a new subaccount though.

Regards,
Gregory Mayorga.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track DFW (Plano TX)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community from Dallas - FWT Texas.

We will be hosting the second SAP Inside Track event in DFW at the SAP Plano office location.
This event is a free event with a max capacity of 20 attendees.  

Register here

The main reason for organizing this event is to continue our community awareness within the DFW area, hopefully we can grow it into other cities and perhaps other states.

If you like to learn, network and if you work in S/4HANA, BTP, AI, Fiori, or any other SAP area, then this event is for you. We will also have food and drinks at the event as well. Don't miss the opportunity to participate.  See you there.

 

When:


Thursday, March 27th, 2025  3:00 - 7:00pm CST

 

Where:


SAP Office

7500 Windrose Ave. #250, Plano, TX 75024

Agenda

  1. Business Process Health – Ginger Lutrell
  2. SAP Learning Hub and SAP’s “Get and Stay Certified” Program – there are several recent announcements by SAP Learning designed to improved SAP developer certifications.  Riley Rainey will review the announcements and can answer questions about the new programs you might have.
  3. Experiments Leveraging Agent AI Capabilities inside SAP – recent developments in Agentic AI offer rich new capabilities for all developers.  Riley Rainey leads the Tutorial Subsystem team inside SAP. SAP Tutorial content is used by up to 20,000 developers a month via the SAP Tutorial Navigator. Riley will discuss fresh experiments that SAP is conducting to use agentic AI and LLMs for quality assurance in SAP’s tutorial subsystem.  This talk describes useful tips for using SAP AI Hub and open source resources such as Ollama, and AI agents like the “browser-use” project.
  4. Navigating a Complex Production Upgrade: A Story of Innovation and Adaptation by Surya Chavali
  5. Designing for AI: Moving Beyond Interfaces to Collaboration
    AI is changing the way people interact with technology, but great AI design isn't just about smarter interfaces—it’s about crafting meaningful collaboration between humans and AI. This talk explores key principles for designing AI-powered experiences that empower users, enhance trust, and create real value. (Virtual Presentation by Anshu Tank)

 

Sponsors:

If you or your company would like to help sponsor the event, please contact me directly on the SAP community. Thank you to the already sponsors for the event.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@jeetendrakapase , Thanks for the consolidated post. I have a question.

Since BDC will store data as "file" instead of keeping it in "tables" like in SAP BW/Datasphere now, how the performance will be in BDC Datasphere? Will there be a impact in performance between BDC with datasphere and without BDC Datasphere ?

entry.title: Re: Excited to be part of this Group!
entry.content:
Welcome @ArunPonnuraj - be sure to look at our location groups as well, in case you haven't done so already. There may be one near where you live that you can join - and learn about local networking events.
Feel free to take part in/or start a discussion in any of our open groups as well!

entry.title: Re: I look forward to having a customer who uses onboardi...
entry.content: Sorry for misunderstanding. We're implementing this scenario now for a client. Upon completion, I'm happy to see if they are willing to talk.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track DFW (Plano TX)
entry.content: Good luck with this event @SergioG_TX - I think you will hit your targets easily!

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track DFW (Plano TX)
entry.content: thank you! I'm excited to host, participate and meet new & previous #SAPCommunity members.

entry.title: Re: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts becaus...
entry.content: Thanks for the help..... I just wanted to clarify. I would think this option would work.

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query- How to search using single mandatory filter out of many mandatory filters
entry.content:
Hi
I have Four mandatory filter fields in my Custom Analytical Query which is created using the "Custom Analytical Query" Fiori app. 

And I need to allow the user to run the query using any single or multiple field combinations of the available mandatory filter fields. 
Currently user have to select all four mandatory filters to search. If this is a Fiori app then I can define the filtration logic using JavaScript from the frontend.

Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: Re: Storage Location Exclude from MRP in S4 HANA
entry.content: How can we know that the system will not be considering that sorage location ?

entry.title: Re: File Upload Logic Flaw in Apache Struts | CVE-2024-53677
entry.content: That is what I was looking for, thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to publish Business Objects reports to SharePoint?
entry.content: I believe the add-on allows the SharePoint site to access and manage BI content objects. We wanted to schedule reports and save it to the SharePoint site similar to schedule/sending report to the file system.
